settings.heading: Your Art. Our Glass. A Global Canvas.
settings.body: Your work printed, sealed under glass, and shipped to premium desk setups worldwide.

settings.title: Royalties on Every Sale
settings.description: Earn a percentage of every pad featuring your artwork.

settings.title: Global Exposure
settings.description: Your work featured on premium desks in 20+ countries.

settings.title: Creative Freedom
settings.description: Full-size canvases at 2:1 and 1:1 ratios. No brand restrictions.

settings.heading: Ready to See Your Art in Glass?
settings.body: Apply today and hear back within 5 business days.

settings.question: How does the program work?
settings.answer: Submit your portfolio through our application form. If selected, we'll work with you to prepare your artwork for print and launch it as a limited drop.

settings.question: Who owns the rights to my artwork?
settings.answer: You retain full ownership of your original artwork. We license it exclusively for use on Glass Pads products for the duration of the drop.

settings.question: What's the timeline from application to launch?
settings.answer: Most drops go from approved application to live product in 4-6 weeks, depending on production scheduling.

settings.question: Is my design exclusive to Glass Pads?
settings.answer: During an active drop, yes. After the drop concludes, exclusivity terms are outlined in your artist agreement.
